mapper.insert: insert into req_activity_log(user_id, project_id, demand_id, event_type, client_type, summary, metadata_json, event_time) values(#{userId}, #{projectId}, #{demandId}, #{eventType}, #{clientType}, #{summary}, #{metadataJson}, #{eventTime})
mapper.select: select count(distinct user_id) from req_activity_log where user_id is not null and event_time >= date_sub(sysdate(), interval 30 day)

select ifnull(u.user_name, concat('用户', agg.user_id)) as userName, ifnull(role_names.roleName, '-') as roleName, agg.demandSubmitCount, agg.packageGenerateCount, agg.planSaveCount, agg.executionReportUploadCount, agg.reviewReportUploadCount, agg.lastActiveTime from ( select user_id, sum(case when event_type in ('demand_created','demand_submitted') then 1 else 0 end) as demandSubmitCount, sum(case when event_type = 'package_generated' then 1 else 0 end) as packageGenerateCount, sum(case when event_type = 'plan_saved' then 1 else 0 end) as planSaveCount, sum(case when event_type = 'execution_report_uploaded' then 1 else 0 end) as executionReportUploadCount, sum(case when event_type = 'review_report_uploaded' then 1 else 0 end) as reviewReportUploadCount, max(event_time) as lastActiveTime from req_activity_log where user_id is not null group by user_id ) agg left join sys_user u on u.user_id = agg.user_id left join ( select ur.user_id, group_concat(distinct r.role_name order by r.role_name separator ',') as roleName from sys_user_role ur left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id group by ur.user_id ) role_names on role_names.user_id = agg.user_id order by agg.lastActiveTime desc
